query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
| where execution_duration_ms > 15000 and data_scanned_bytes > 1000000000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| round(range_s/60/60/24) as range_day
| range_s/60 as range_min
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| substring(query,0,{{search_max_chrs}}) as query
| values(session_id) as ex_sessions,values(range_day) as range_days,avg(range_min) as range_minutes,avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(duration_s) as total_s,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned, sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events, avg(duration_s) as avg_duration_s by query_type,user_name,query
| sort  bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1G as gb_scan
| limit 100
| fields -bytes_scanned
| substring(ex_sessions,0,136) as ex_sessions

sources.panelTitle: Highest Scan Single Searches > 15s and >  by total Scan GB
rowContext: Problem Searches - Highest Scan GB For Single User/Search
